title: AISC 360-16 Steel I-Beam Design
description: Design steel i-beams in accordance with AISC 360-16.

section.description: Section. Symbol: Section. Select Custom to edit section dimensions or select a shape from our library.

d.description: Depth (D). Units: in. Total section depth.

bt.description: Width (Bt). Units: in. Total section width.

tt.description: Flange Thickness (tt). Units: in. Flange thickness for the section.

tw.description: Web Thickness (tw). Units: in. Web thickness for the section.

Fy.description: Yield Stress (Fy). Symbol: F_{y}. Units: ksi. Steel yield stress.

Fu.description: Ultimate Stress (Fu). Symbol: F_{u}. Units: ksi. Steel ultimate stress.

lz.description: Span (Lz). Units: ft. Strong geometric axis unbraced length.

ly.description: Span (Ly). Units: ft. Weak geometric axis unbraced length.

kz.description: Effective Length Factor (kz). Strong geometric axis effective length factor.

ky.description: Effective Length Factor (ky). Weak geometric axis effective length factor.

lb.description: Unbraced Lateral Length (Lb). Units: ft. Unsupported length for lateral buckling.

lt.description: Unbraced Torsional Length (Lt). Symbol: L_t. Units: ft. Unsupported length for torsional buckling.

Cb.description: Torsional Buckling Factor (Cb). Lateral torsional buckling modification factor for non-uniform moment diagrams.

Puc.description: Axial Compression (Puc). Units: kip. Axial Compression.

Put.description: Axial Tension (Put). Units: kip. Axial Tension.

Vuz.description: Shear (Vuz). Units: kip. Shear force about minor axis.

Vuy.description: Shear (Vuy). Units: kip. Shear force about major axis.

Muz.description: Major Bending Moment (Muz). Units: kip-ft. Moment about major axis.

Muy.description: Minor Bending Moment (Muy). Units: kip-ft. Moment about minor axis.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
